description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a glossy, deep purple glaze covering its entire upper surface, giving it a mirror-like finish. The cake sits on a golden, reflective tray and features a crunchy, textured base that appears to be made of nuts or biscuit. On top, there is an elegant arrangement of assorted berries, including blackberries, raspberries, and blueberries, along with a few small, spherical golden decorations. The cake's surface is impeccably smooth and shiny, contrasting with the rougher, crumbly texture of the base. The overall presentation is modern and sophisticated, making it suitable for upscale urban patisseries or special events.
description: A glossy, deep purple glazed cake with a crunchy base, topped with assorted berries and golden spheres, presented on a reflective golden tray. The design is modern and elegant.
description_view_0: Front view shows the shiny purple glaze, berry cluster, and a golden sphere on the left side of the crunchy base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the berry arrangement on top and reveals more of the golden base and tray.
description_view_2: The back view displays two golden spheres on the base and a partial view of the berry topping.
description_view_3: This side view shows the smooth purple glaze, two golden spheres on the left, and the berry decoration centered on top.
